---
title: "Long, Long Ago: An Autobiography. By Mary Lisle"
---

## Long, Long Ago: An Autobiography. By Mary Lisle

**Author:** Fanny Caroline Lefroy
**Date:** 1856
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

This novel was originally serialized in <i>MP</i> (January 1855-August 1856).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
